steps.title: Identify what qualifies for the honor
steps.content: The National Heritage Fellowship is created to honor “exceptional folk and traditional artists.” Mary Holiday Black received this fellowship. The decisive clue: the blank describes what makes her exceptional and worthy of this honor.

steps.title: Match the quality to the choices
steps.content: ”Contributions to the arts” directly describes the positive, constructive work that makes an exceptional traditional artist. The other three—doubts about, imitations of, and misunderstandings of—all contradict what would qualify someone for an honor. Mary Holiday Black's lifetime contributions to the traditional arts align with the fellowship's purpose of recognizing exceptional artists. That matches choice A — A is correct.
